Localization.Description: A user followed an external link

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} followed an external link to phishing site {datafield2} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} followed an external link to site {datafield2} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} followed an external link to phishing site {datafield2} created using Punycode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} followed an external link to site {datafield2} (name for the public Burp Collaborator server) on host {event_src.host}
